hooks.command: git fetch origin develop 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ Synced with origin/develop' || echo '⚠️ Could not fetch origin/develop (offline?)'

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '/migrations/[0-9]'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: No se pueden modificar migraciones existentes de Django. Las migraciones son registros inmutables."}}'; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(env|pem|key)$|credentials\.json|secrets\.'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: No se pueden editar archivos con secretos o credenciales."}}'; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'npm install.*(\@mui|\.@chakra|\@mantine|antd|bootstrap|react-bootstrap|\@material)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: Este proyecto usa shadcn/ui + Radix UI exclusivamente. No instalar otras librerías de UI. Usa: npx shadcn@latest add {component}"}}'; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git push.*(origin\s+(main|master|develop)\b|--force)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: No se permite push directo a branches protegidos. Usa PR: feature/* o fix/* → develop → main."}}'; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then MSG=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oP '(?<=-m ["'\'']).+?(?=["'\''](\s|$))' || echo ''); if [ -n "$MSG" ] && ! echo "$MSG" | grep -qE '^(feat|fix|refactor|docs|ci|chore|test|style|perf)(\(.+\))?!?:'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOQUEADO: El commit debe usar conventional commits. Formato: tipo(scope): descripción. Tipos: feat, fix, refactor, docs, ci, chore, test, style, perf"}}'; else exit 0; fi; else exit 0; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'backend/'; then ruff check --fix "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ Ruff auto-fix applied' || true; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tsx$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/src/'; then if grep -qE '(useState|useEffect|useRef|useCallback|onClick|onChange|onSubmit|useContext)' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ! head -5 "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q '"use client"' 2>/dev/null; then echo '⚠️ ADVERTENCIA: '"$FILE_PATH"' usa hooks/eventos de React pero NO tiene "use client" al inicio. En Next.js App Router, los componentes con interactividad requieren la directiva "use client".'; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'backend/.*/models\.py$'; then if grep -qE '^class\s+\w+.*models\.Model\)' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && ! grep -q 'TenantAwareModel' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo '🚨 ALERTA TENANT: '"$FILE_PATH"' tiene modelos que heredan de models.Model en vez de TenantAwareModel. TODOS los modelos de negocio DEBEN heredar de TenantAwareModel (backend/core/models.py). Solo Tenant y modelos de configuración global pueden heredar de models.Model.'; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'backend/'; then ISSUES=''; if grep -nE '\.objects\.all\(\)' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '#.*noqa|#.*tenant-safe' > /tmp/tenant_check 2>/dev/null && [ -s /tmp/tenant_check ]; then ISSUES="$ISSUES$(echo '⚠️ .objects.all() sin filtro de tenant encontrado:'; cat /tmp/tenant_check)"; fi; if grep -nE '(cursor\.execute|connection\.cursor|raw\()' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '#.*noqa' > /tmp/raw_sql_check 2>/dev/null && [ -s /tmp/raw_sql_check ]; then ISSUES="$ISSUES$(echo '\n⚠️ Raw SQL detectado (riesgo de inyección SQL y bypass de tenant):'; cat /tmp/raw_sql_check)"; fi; if grep -nE '\.extra\(' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | grep -vE '#.*noqa' > /tmp/extra_check 2>/dev/null && [ -s /tmp/extra_check ]; then ISSUES="$ISSUES$(echo '\n⚠️ QuerySet.extra() detectado (deprecado, riesgo de SQL injection):'; cat /tmp/extra_check)"; fi; if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo "$ISSUES"; fi; rm -f /tmp/tenant_check /tmp/raw_sql_check /tmp/extra_check; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.tsx$' && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'frontend/'; then if grep -nE 'dangerouslySetInnerHTML' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null > /tmp/xss_check && [ -s /tmp/xss_check ]; then echo '🚨 ALERTA XSS: dangerouslySetInnerHTML detectado en '"$FILE_PATH"':'; cat /tmp/xss_check; echo 'Asegúrate de sanitizar el HTML con DOMPurify u otra librería antes de renderizar.'; fi; rm -f /tmp/xss_check; fi

hooks.prompt: You are a UI/UX design reviewer for NERBIS, a multi-tenant SaaS platform using Next.js 16 + React 19 + shadcn/ui + TailwindCSS 4. The tool_input contains the file path and the edit that was made. ONLY review if the file path ends in .tsx and is inside frontend/src/. If NOT a frontend .tsx file, return PASS immediately. Check: (1) Uses shadcn/ui components — not custom or third-party UI libraries. (2) TailwindCSS utility classes only — no inline styles or custom CSS modules. (3) Mobile-first responsive design (sm:, md:, lg: breakpoints). (4) Proper visual hierarchy: consistent spacing, clear headings, adequate contrast. (5) No generic AI aesthetics (avoid Inter font, purple-on-white gradients). (6) Accessible: proper aria labels on interactive elements, alt text on images. Return PASS if compliant or not a frontend file. Otherwise list ONLY actual violations (max 3, one line each). If the edit is minor (import change, variable rename), return PASS.

You are a thorough UI/UX design reviewer for NERBIS. The tool_input contains the file path and content. ONLY review if the file path ends in .tsx and is inside frontend/src/. If NOT a frontend .tsx file, return PASS immediately. For frontend .tsx files: (1) Read .claude/skills/web-design-guidelines/SKILL.md for UI guidelines. (2) Read .claude/skills/shadcn/rules/styling.md and .claude/skills/shadcn/rules/composition.md for component patterns. (3) Read .claude/skills/vercel-react-best-practices/SKILL.md for React/Next.js performance patterns. (4) Review the new file against these skills. Check: shadcn/ui usage, TailwindCSS compliance, Server Component by default, mobile-first responsive, accessibility (aria, alt, semantic HTML), visual hierarchy and spacing consistency, no generic AI aesthetics. Return PASS or FAIL with specific line-number violations grouped by category (Components, Styling, Accessibility, Performance). Max 5 issues.

hooks.command: echo '📌 RECORDATORIO POST-COMPACTACIÓN: Este proyecto usa SDD (Spec-Driven Development). Si estás en medio de un flujo SDD, verifica el estado del cambio actual con mem_search en Engram. Branch flow: feature/* → develop → main. Conventional commits obligatorios. Skills disponibles: multi-tenancy, shadcn, vercel-react, web-design-guidelines, code-quality, frontend-design. Agents: backend-implementer, frontend-implementer, security-reviewer, test-runner.'

CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | head -20); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then SUMMARY="Archivos modificados en esta sesión: $(echo $CHANGED | tr '\n' ', ')"; echo "📝 Cambios pendientes detectados. Considera guardar progreso en Engram si esta sesión tiene trabajo importante sin commit."; fi

echo '🌳 Worktree creado. RECORDATORIO: (1) Al terminar, limpia el worktree con sdd-archive Step 8 o manualmente. (2) Cada worktree debe tener su propio feature branch. (3) No olvides git fetch origin develop antes de crear el branch.'
